content_excerpt:
Cannot directly modify the workspace from this API session. Apply this minimal change to `src/tau_coding/self_fix_ticket_repair.py`:

```diff
-    coder = loop_receipt["cycles"][0]["coder"]["scillm_call"]
-    reviewer = loop_receipt["cycles"][0]["reviewer"]["scillm_call"]
+    final_cycle = loop_receipt["cycles"][-1]
+    coder = final_cycle["coder"]["scillm_call"]
+    reviewer = final_cycle["reviewer"]["scillm_call"]
```

Review note: this changes the proof markdown citation source from the first repair cycle to the final repair cycle, matching `grahama1970/tau#40`.
